title: ConvertKit vs MailerLite (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit and MailerLite: pricing, features, and performance. Find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: ConvertKit vs MailerLite: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: ConvertKit and MailerLite are two popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences. ConvertKit is purpose-built for creators and course sellers, while MailerLite targets budget-conscious small businesses and freelancers. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your goals and budget.

comparison_table.tool_b: Drag-drop editor, pop-ups, surveys, affordable pricing

choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or online course seller needing advanced commerce and automation features
You want built-in landing pages and sequences specifically optimized for creator workflows
You're willing to pay more for features tailored to digital product sales
choose_b_if: You're a small business or freelancer on a tight budget looking for affordable entry-level pricing
You want an intuitive drag-and-drop editor with pop-ups and surveys included
You prioritize ease of use and strong customer satisfaction ratings

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ConvertKit excels for creators with advanced automation and commerce features, while MailerLite is superior for budget-conscious users who need simplicity. MailerLite has higher customer satisfaction ratings overall, but ConvertKit offers more specialized creator-focused functionality.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or MailerLite?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to ConvertKit's $29/month. Both offer free tiers supporting up to 1,000 subscribers, but MailerLite provides better value for small businesses and those testing email marketing.

faq.q: Can I switch from MailerLite to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list exports and imports. Most email marketing platforms allow CSV exports, making migration straightforward. However, you may need to manually recreate automations and sequences on your new platform, as these often don't transfer directly between systems.
